name: Gold Circuit Electronics Ltd.
summary: Gold Circuit Electronics Ltd. manufactures and sells computer-related products worldwide. It offers servers, workstations, notebook personal computers, desktop personal computers, etc. The company's products are used in telecommunication, networking, cell phones, high-current power supplies, storage, automotive, and other fields. Gold Circuit Electronics Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
